question: What volume year is displayed on the header of the review article document? A. 240 B. 2009 C. 180 D. 10
How many servings per container are indicated on the nutrition facts label?
What color is the primary text on the documents displayed in the video? A. Yellow B. White C. Black D. Green
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A Nutrition Facts label appears on the left side next to a green logo. A medical review article titled Diagnosis and Treatment of Neurocysticercosis displays a brain cross-section with cysts on the right. Text highlighted in yellow reads the most common cause of acquired epilepsy worldwide. A second document titled Neurocysticercosis: Fireflies in the Central Nervous System appears with a white text box describing cysticerci creating cavities.

A. text 'Diagnosis and Treatment of Neurocysticercosis' in bold black serif font B. text 'Neurocysticercosis: Fireflies in the Central Nervous System' in large grey sans-serif font C. text 'Review Article' in large serif font D. author names 'Christina M. Coyle' and 'Herbert B. Tanowitz' in bold serif font

Where is the white text box overlay positioned on the document page after the page transition? A. Left B. Center C. Right D. Bottom
What action is occurring in the opening segment?
Describe the sequence of visual elements and changes that occur on the screen from the start to the end of the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a Nutrition Facts label and logo are displayed; at 2s, the document title appears fully on screen; at 4s, a yellow highlight marks the epilepsy text; at 12s, a brain specimen image appears on the right side of the page.

question: Has the axial MRI brain scan image appeared on the screen yet?

What visual change occurs in this segment? A. MRI brain scan image appears on screen. B. Yellow highlighter mark appears on document text. C. Biological brain specimen with cysts replaces MRI scan view. D. Scanning electron micrograph of scolex/organism appears.

How has the document display changed since the start of the video? A. The title text disappears from the page B. A white text box overlay appears in the center C. The text font color changes to red D. The abstract section moves to the top
What physical abnormalities in the brain tissue do the bright spots on the MRI scan represent?
canonical_answer: They represent numerous translucent, spherical, gelatinous cysts scattered throughout the brain tissue.
